# STRAT.007 ? Positive Discipline

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** parenting_educational
**Domain:** PARENTING_EDUCATIONAL
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Mutual respect; belonging and significance; long-term effectiveness; social/life skills; mistakes as learning; focus on solutions

## Application
Kind AND firm; help child feel belonging; teach skills; reframe mistakes as opportunities; collaborative problem-solving; focus future not past

## Key Values
- Mutual respect
- Belonging
- Skill teaching
- Solution focus
- Kindness + firmness

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, parenting_educational

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
